notes: Compound noun: 'vor' (before) + 'Urteil' (judgment). Refers to a preconceived opinion not based on reason or experience.

sentences.german: Er hat ein Vorurteil gegen Menschen aus anderen Ländern.
sentences.english: He has a prejudice against people from other countries.

sentences.german: Wir müssen unsere Vorurteile überwinden, um offen miteinander umzugehen.
sentences.english: We must overcome our prejudices in order to interact openly with one another.
